posts.title: AI Safety and Compliance in Engineering Automation: A Practical Framework
posts.excerpt: Learn how to implement AI automation safely in engineering workflows. A comprehensive framework covering data validation, process controls, standards compliance, and human oversight.

author.name: Kingsley Uzowulu
author.title: Founder & Lead Engineer, CEng MIMechE
author.bio: Chartered Engineer with 21+ years of experience in oil & gas, EPC, and manufacturing. Passionate about applying AI to solve real engineering challenges.

posts.title: Why Engineering Companies Are Losing Bids (And How AI Fixes It)
posts.excerpt: Your competitors are using AI to win contracts you should have won. Learn why traditional bid processes are failing and the three AI solutions that can turn your win rate around.

author.name: Kingsley Uzowulu

posts.title: Agentic AI for Engineering: Autonomous Workflows That Actually Work
posts.excerpt: Agentic AI is reshaping how engineering teams operate. Learn how autonomous AI agents can handle complex multi-step workflows — from document processing to procurement — without constant human oversight.
